scripts.build: npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/core run build && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/server run build && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/web run build
scripts.canonical:keys:dry-run: npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/core run build && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/server run canonical:keys -- --dry-run --report-file "../../artifacts/latest-canonical-key-report.json"
scripts.canonical:keys:apply: npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/core run build && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/server run canonical:keys -- --apply --report-file "../../artifacts/latest-canonical-key-report.json"
scripts.test: npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/core run test && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/server run test && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/web run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/core run typecheck && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/server run typecheck && npm --workspace @poker-tournament-lab/web run typecheck
